_doc.purpose: Daily contraceptive pill (real-world analogue: combined oral contraceptive). Suppresses the FSH/LH surge that drives ovulation. Modeled as a presence-only status (no stat_modifiers) - ReproductionCycle checks whether this status is currently active each day.
_doc.mechanic: Cycles_Menstruation/Cycles_Estrus only act on this once the cycle naturally reaches its post-ovulation resting stage (Rest / Interestrus) - nothing left to interrupt that cycle at that point. While the status stays active there, cycleValue is held/reset to the start of that stage every day (SetCycle in Cycles_Menstruation.cs / Cycles_Estrus.cs). Any cycle already past Rest/Interestrus when dosing starts (Menstrual, PreOvulation/Proestrus, Ovulation/Estrus) completes normally first, including possibly ovulating that cycle - matches real-world quick-start guidance where only a luteal-phase start is unambiguously safe.
_doc.decay_reasoning: decaySpeed tuned so ~50 severity (one dose, clamped to the top variant) decays to 0 in ~41.7h: long enough that once-daily dosing keeps the status continuously active, short enough that a fully missed day (~48h gap) reliably lets it decay out before the next day's check, so a lapse actually breaks the contraceptive hold as intended.
_doc.neutral_default: Default value is severity 0 (status absent) so any character never given the item behaves exactly as before this feature was added.

list._comment: Applied by consumable_medicine_contraceptive_daily. Severity spikes near 50 on dose, then decays naturally back to 0 over about 1.75 in-game days if not redosed.

baselineVariation._decaySpeed_note: severity/minute. ~50 severity / 0.02 per min =~ 2500 min =~ 41.7 hours to fully decay.

variants._note: No stat_modifiers - this status is only ever queried for presence (severity > 0) by ReproductionCycle.

list.tooltip: An oral contraceptive tablet. Taken daily, it suppresses ovulation once the cycle reaches its resting phase.

comp_Ingestible._note: Plausible oral-tablet pacing (unlike consumable_medicine_analgesic's intentionally fast debug numbers): ~1.5hr onset, digests over ~6-7min once absorption starts, dose sized to push chara_status_contraceptive_daily to its 50-severity ceiling (20*3=60 delivered, comfortably clamps to 50 even accounting for concurrent decay).

zh-cn.chara_status_contraceptive_daily_tooltip: 该角色的经期进度会在到达平稳期后暂停。
zh-cn.consumable_medicine_contraceptive_daily_: 口服避孕药片，需每日服用。只要药效持续，便会将服用者的周期进度暂停。
